name: Cyber dragon v.1
description:
You are exploring a abandoned factory and spot a dragon like machine (in picture)it is known as cyber dragon from the cyber dragon project,a project started by humanity a long time ago but obviously abandoned,it is built to destroy monsters so be cautious if you are a monster

Give me advice on how to make this better

Based off a monster in Yu-Gi-Oh that goes by the same name cyber dragon
creator: sonicmanracer2
